Name: Engagement with Humanitarian Groups
Description: Collaborate with humanitarian organizations to clarify their roles and debunk the false allegations

Name: Enhance Monitoring and Detection
Description: Improve mechanisms for detecting and monitoring malign influence operations across digital platforms

Name: Secure Communication Channels
Description: Use encrypted communication tools and verify the identities of interviewers before sharing sensitive information

Name: Develop Rapid Response Protocols
Description: Use encrypted communication tools and verify the identities of interviewers before sharing sensitive information

Name: Strengthen Public Awareness
Description: Educate the public about the tactics used in Influence Operations, and promote critical assessment of information

Name: Invest in Automation
Description: Use automated tools for detecting and flagging coordinated inauthentic behavior

Name: Heightened Security Measures
Description: Implement measures to verify identities of interviewers and secure communication channels

Name: Strengthen Coordination
Description: Enhance collaboration between fact-checking organizations and newsrooms to manage the volume of false claims effectively

Name: Increase Awareness
Description: Educate journalists and researchers about the tactics used by disinformation campaigns to better recognize and respond to them

Name: Increase International Cooperation
Description: Coordinate with international partners to share intelligence and develop collective strategies against foreign influence operations

Name: Name and Shame
Description: Contact journalists to highlight this attack, exposing Information Operation

Name: Scrutinise numbers
Description: examine statistics mentioned by threat actors with data provided by the credible institutions

Name: Improve Filtering
Description: Develop better filtering mechanisms to identify and isolate malicious content quickly

Name: Vigilant Screening
Description: Scrutinise interview requests rigorously, verifying email addresses against official sources, and scrutinising the content of requests

Name: Collaborate with countering FIMI / disinformation organizations
Description: Submit identified cases to countering disinformation organizations. If hard to identify, consult experts.

Name: Robust Vetting Procedures
Description: Implement thorough verification processes for interview requests, including cross-referencing email addresses and checking the authenticity of media outlets

Name: Record Given Interview
Description: When giving interviews, record them themselves to have evidence of what really was said

Name: Expand Debunking Efforts
Description: Scale up efforts to debunk false narratives and disseminate corrected information widely

Name: Collaborate with Social Media Platforms
Description: Work closely with social media companies to identify and mitigate inauthentic behavior and content

Name: Engage with African and Middle Eastern media
Description: work with CSOs and national institutions with specific public initiatives to deny the false narrative blaming Ukraine for the instability of the food supply chain

Name: Media Literacy In Education
Description: Integrate media literacy into school curriculums to teach students critical thinking skills and how to verify information sources.

Name: Digital Literacy Campaigns
Description: Launch widespread digital literacy campaigns to educate the public on recognizing AI-generated content and identifying FIMI markers.

Name: Collaborative Fact-Checking Networks
Description: Establish collaborative networks of fact-checkers to ensure rapid verification and debunking of false information.

Name: Fact-Checking Partnerships
Description: Create partnerships between fact-checking organizations and media outlets for quick fact-checking and debunking.

Name: Pre-Bunking Initiatives
Description: Support pre-bunking initiatives to inoculate the public against FIMI.

Name: AI-Generated Content Labeling
Description: Implement regulations requiring clear labeling of AI-generated content and disclosure of automated content production.

Name: Social Media Platform Regulations
Description: Enforce stricter regulations on social media platforms to monitor and remove FIMI, with penalties for non-compliance.

Name: Transparency And Accountability Requirements
Description: Mandate transparency and accountability requirements for platforms and content creators.

Name: Evolving Legal Frameworks
Description: Update and refine legal frameworks to address the evolving tactics of FIMI, ensuring that laws are adaptable and enforceable (DSA - AI regulation, VLOPs and VLOSEs)

Name: Strategic Communication Plans
Description: Develop strategic communication plans to pre-emptively address and counter FIMI activities before they gain traction.

Name: Influencer And Community Leader Partnerships
Description: Partner with trusted influencers and community leaders to disseminate accurate information and counter FIMI.

Name: Advanced AI Detection Tools
Description: Invest in advanced AI tools capable of detecting AI-generated content and identifying patterns indicative of coordinated FIMI campaigns.

Name: Typosquatting And Infringement Monitoring
Description: Utilize platforms like Recorded Future Brand Intelligence to monitor and combat typosquatting domains and infringing content.

Name: Real-Time Monitoring Systems
Description: Deploy sophisticated monitoring systems that use machine learning and artificial intelligence to detect and analyze FIMI campaigns in real-time.

Name: International Cooperation
Description: Foster international cooperation to share intelligence and best practices for combating FIMI campaigns.

Name: Sanctions And Legal Repercussions
Description: Impose sanctions, penalties and legal repercussions on foreign actors involved in FIMI campaigns.

Name: Support For Independent Media
Description: Provide financial and resource support to independent media organizations.

Name: Journalist And Media Personnel Security
Description: Ensure the safety and security of journalists and media personnel.

Name: Government-Social Media-Civil Society Partnerships
Description: Foster partnerships between governments, social media companies, and civil society organizations to develop and implement effective counter-FIMI strategies.

Name: Industry Standards Development
Description: Develop and promote industry standards for detecting and mitigating FIMI, encouraging best practices across sectors.

Name: Ongoing FIMI Research Investment
Description: Invest in ongoing research to understand the mechanisms and impacts of FIMI, including the development of new technologies and methodologies for countering it.

Name: Interdisciplinary Research Collaboration
Description: Promote interdisciplinary collaboration among researchers from fields such as computer science, psychology, sociology, and political science to develop comprehensive counter-FIMI strategies.

Name: Research Grants And Funding
Description: Provide grants and funding for research on FIMI and innovative countermeasures.

Name: Strengthening Cybersecurity For Domain Administrators
Description: Encourage domain administrators to strengthen their sites against cyber attacks.

Name: Demonetize disinformation
Description: Give advertisers more transparency and control over their ad placements so their advertisements don’t unwittingly finance known disinformation sites.
